title: Destination address mapping in pesto
body:
Currently HostIP is stripped from port mappings because pesto only handles host-side binding — netavark DNAT handles the rest. This has limitations:
- Same port on different HostIPs (e.g. `-p 127.0.0.1:8080:80 -p 127.0.0.2:8080:80`) does not work
- Requires netavark DNAT rules that don't restrict on destination address

https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4394456509
https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4396210938
https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4395814422

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
